rights.notes: The released fields are original CSS compositions. The supplied references are not copied, cropped, recompressed or published.

recipe.safeZone: All product copy remains on independent paper or ink surfaces.
recipe.implementationNotes: CSS gradients, rectangles, circles and pseudo-element grain. Signature colours are not used as score or status semantics.
recipe.fallbackNotes: The static CSS field is the default and does not depend on JavaScript.

desktop.notes: A split paper and field masthead at 1440 by 900.

mobile.notes: A purpose-built 390 by 844 composition with fewer forms below the copy.

og.notes: A separate deterministic 1200 by 630 social composition.

variants.reviewNotes: Promoted after production-build desktop, mobile, no-script, print, reduced-motion, contrast and overflow checks.

desktop.notes: No overflow or console errors. Product copy remains on the paper panel.

mobile.notes: No horizontal overflow. The mobile composition uses fewer forms and preserves the full headline.

og.notes: The Open Graph route returned a valid 1200 by 630 image.

reducedMotion.notes: Fields are static and the reduced-motion rule disables residual interface animation.

saveData.notes: No raster field asset or scripted renderer is requested.

noScript.notes: The complete headline and field rendered with JavaScript disabled.

print.notes: Print-media emulation retained the static field with no horizontal overflow.

openGraph.notes: The route returned HTTP 200 and a valid 1200 by 630 image.

approval.notes: Technically promoted after session QA. Charlie retains final taste approval.
